rules.rule_text:
rule xmlc : banker
{
	strings:
		$a = "/c del" fullword
		$b = "PostDel" fullword
		$c = ">> NUL" fullword
		$d = "LOADXML"
		$e = "lm.dat"
		$f = "---------------%s----------------"

	condition:
		filesize < 150KB and ( 3 of ( $a , $b , $c , $d , $e , $f ) )
}

rule zbot : banker
{
	strings:
		$a = "__SYSTEM__" wide
		$b = "*tanentry*"
		$c = "*<option"
		$d = "*<select"
		$e = "*<input"

	condition:
		($a and $b ) or ( $c and $d and $e )
}

rule banbra : banker
{
	strings:
		$a = "senha" fullword nocase
		$b = "cartao" fullword nocase
		$c = "caixa"
		$d = "login" fullword nocase
		$e = ".com.br"

	condition:
		#a> 3 and #b > 3 and #c > 3 and #d > 3 and #e > 3
}

rule_metadata.name: spyeye
rule_metadata.description: Indicates that the SpyEye Trojan is installed

rules.rule_text:
rule spyeye
{
	meta:
		description = "Indicates that the SpyEye Trojan is installed"

	strings:
		$a = "SPYNET"
		$b = "SpyEye"

	condition:
		($a and $b )
}

rule tdl3
{
	meta:
		null_string = 1

	strings:
		$1 = "\\\\?\\globalroot\\"
		$2 = ".ini"

	condition:
		all of them
}
